description: TCP port the Fleet Manager listens on
Global map ID used when creating pickup tasks
What dispatcher sends when tyre is ready (can be TYRE_MANUFACTURED etc.)
What dispatcher sends to confirm release (can be TYRE_RELEASED etc.)
What painting station sends to confirm pickup (can be TYRE_PICKED etc.)
What painting station sends when idle (customizable)
What painting station sends when busy (customizable)
What fleet sends to dispatcher when robot says AT_DISPATCHER (customizable)
What fleet sends to painting station when robot says CHECK_PAINTING (customizable)
What fleet sends to painting station when robot says AT_PAINTING (customizable)
